trap: Naive object merge iterating all keys including __proto__
description: Freeze prototypes or use Object.create(null) to prevent prototype pollution

trap: Spreading req.body directly into DB update
description: Allowlist fields explicitly -- never spread req.body into DB operations
Avoid nested quantifiers in regex -- use RE2 or linear-time alternatives
Allowlist redirect targets or validate same-origin before redirect

trap: Stack trace and query params in error response
description: Generic error to client, structured log server-side -- never leak stack/query

trap: OAuth callback without state parameter validation
description: Validate state parameter in OAuth callback to prevent CSRF
IDOR: verify resource ownership (userId === session.userId) before returning

Supply chain: adds at least one measure BEYOND `npm audit` itself — a dedicated tool (lockfile-lint, Socket.dev, Snyk) OR digest-pinned CI images, OR install-script detection (npm query preinstall/postinstall). `npm audit signatures` alone does NOT count (still npm audit).
